creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Mon May 20 16:01:51 2013
New Revision: 318610
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318610

Log:
  - Update to 3.0.4
  - Sort pkg-plist
  - Trim Makefile header
  
  Changes:
  http://www.rabbitmq.com/release-notes/README-3.0.4.txt
  http://www.rabbitmq.com/release-notes/README-3.0.3.txt
  http://www.rabbitmq.com/release-notes/README-3.0.2.txt
  http://www.rabbitmq.com/release-notes/README-3.0.1.txt
  
  PR:		ports/178315
  Submitted by:	olgeni
  Reviewed by:	culot (mentor), maintainer (timeout, > 14 days)

Modified:
  head/net/rabbitmq/Makefile
  head/net/rabbitmq/distinfo
  head/net/rabbitmq/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net/rabbitmq/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/rabbitmq/Makefile	Mon May 20 15:56:04 2013	(r318609)
+++ head/net/rabbitmq/Makefile	Mon May 20 16:01:51 2013	(r318610)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	rabbitmq
-# Date Created:				2008-07-11
-# Whom:					Phillip Neumann <pneumann@gmail.com>
-#
+# Created by: Phillip Neumann <pneumann@gmail.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	rabbitmq
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.0
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.4
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.rabbitmq.com/releases/rabbitmq-server/v${PORTVERSION}/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-server-${PORTVERSION}

Modified: head/net/rabbitmq/distinfo
==============================================================================
